机制说明：默认不实时推送，默认时效窗口为 90 天。只有 `immediate` 才适合接微信、邮件或 Slack 这类即时提醒；`daily` 进入每日简报；`archive` 只保留，不打扰。高价值分类（合作、产品、监管、市场）和业务动作匹配内容在时效上给予一定宽容度。

   - 摘要：Spero Therapeutics is putting over $1 billion on the line in exchange for rights to develop SP001, an anti-CD40L antibody, for IgG4-related disease. A Phase 2 study is planned for the second quarter of 2027.

11. [Spero pivots to I&I with $1.1B deal for Innovent antibody, sells slice of Utebzi royalties for $105M](https://www.fiercebiotech.com/biotech/spero-shifts-focus-ii-11b-biobucks-antibody-licensing-deal-innovent-and-105m-raise)

12. [GSK to seek FDA approval for Jemperli in small but high-profile cancer use after phase 2 win](https://www.fiercepharma.com/pharma/gsk-seek-fda-approval-jemperli-small-high-profile-cancer-use-after-phase-2-win)

   - 摘要：In what GSK says represents a potential way to transform treatment for patients with certain types of rectal cancer, the company’s Jemperli has met the main goal of a phase 2 trial, teeing up an application with the FDA.

## 下一步可确认

1. 哪些分类需要即时推送，而不是只进日报？
2. 休假前公司名单里，哪些公司是高优先级？
3. 输出给谁看：自己、市场部、BD，还是老板看 dashboard？
